nasb.text: For the Lord your God has blessed you in all that you have done; He has known your wanderings through this great wilderness. These forty years the Lord your God has been with you; you have not lacked a thing.” ’

esv.text: For the Lord your God has blessed you in all the work of your hands. He knows your going through this great wilderness. These forty years the Lord your God has been with you. You have lacked nothing.”’

cnv.text: 因為耶和華你的　神，對於你手裡所作的一切事，都已經賜福給你；他也知道你怎樣走這大曠野；這四十年來，耶和華你們的　神常與你同在，使你毫無缺乏。”’

ccb.text: 你们的上帝耶和华使你们凡事蒙福，看顾着你们走过这辽阔的旷野，四十年来与你们同在，使你们一无所缺。’
